purpose: Machine-readable handoff so any agent (Codex, Claude, other) can take over cold. Read the referenced md files for full detail — this file is the index.

repo.vcs: git, branch master, remote origin=https://github.com/dkadaj75-dev/condo-life-web.git (NEVER pushed — local only; push only if the designer asks)
repo.run: npm run dev (node server.js, port 5173; serves game + tools + GET/PUT /api/data/<path>; game hot-reload-polls /data/*.json every 2s)

authoritative_docs.AGENTS.md: Agent handover: conventions, verification gates, commit rules, pitfalls, HOW TO INVOKE CODEX (codex exec --sandbox workspace-write "..." < /dev/null; --full-auto is deprecated and hangs on stdin). Codex reads this automatically.
authoritative_docs.PROJECT_CONTEXT.md: Canonical living design + as-built doc. WINS over everything else. §5 conventions; §7.x = every shipped system as-built. Update it with every behavior/schema change.
authoritative_docs.ROADMAP_NEXT.md: Designer request batches 1-6, each item marked DONE with pointers. Append new designer requests here verbatim before building.
authoritative_docs.WEB_GAME_ROADMAP.md: Original phase plan (historical; superseded where PROJECT_CONTEXT disagrees).

designer.who: Septentrion — NOT a programmer; drives everything through the browser tools and plain-language batches
workflow_rules: Designer playtests constantly: uncommitted data/*.json / public asset changes in the tree are THEIRS — commit separately as 'Designer data edits via tools', NEVER revert, never mix into code commits
One commit per slice, imperative subject; verify (tests+tsc+boot) BEFORE committing
Designer pastes Windows file paths into tools — normalize to URLs under public/

architecture.stack: Vite + three.js + TypeScript, PWA (manifest+SW: network-only /data+/api, never cache them)
architecture.principle: Everything data-driven: if the designer might change it, it is a JSON field with a tool UI, not code. No magic numbers — tunables in data/tuning.json.
architecture.game_modules_pattern: game/*.ts = pure headless-testable logic + thin three.js/UI layer. Precedents: doors, accidents, sprites, marker, quests, visas, work, phone, garbage, buymode, bills, food, happiness, censor, progressbar, bladder, duration, wallview, windows, camera, facing, nav, audio, fbxclips, sprites, contextmenu (in ui), work.
architecture.tools_pattern: tools/*.html: plain inline script exposed as window.<Tool> (jsdom-testable) + separate type=module script only when three.js/game imports needed; tools import game logic, never reimplement; PUT whole files JSON.stringify(data,null,2); shared tools/nav.js tab strip (add new tools to its TOOLS list)
architecture.sim_time_rule: All gameplay animation/timers run on sim-time sdt (pause/buy-mode/game-over freeze, 2x/3x scale); real-time only for cosmetics
architecture.side_effect_rule: Action side effects (cleanup, waste, accident rolls, food spawn-at-arrival, promotion rolls) fire ONLY on completed actions (stopAction(completed=true)) — never on cancels/interrupts

data_files.data/assets.json: AssetDef: category (incl. transient/door/window), mesh (GLB or image/GIF sprite), icon, buyable, requiresQuestUnlock, footprint, facingDeg, meshFit, usePose{sit,lie,use}, seats/seatTarget, interactions[], environmentScore, sound, accidents[] risk, combustibility, clearedBy, garbage{capacity}, food{hungerGain,perishHours}, survivalImportance, light{color,intensity,distance,yOffset,defaultOn}, wallMounted{heightY}, door{...exterior}, sprite{orientation,fps}
data_files.data/interactions.json: ActionDef: animation, autonomyEligible, seatAware, censor, primaryNeed, needGains/skillGains, conditions (quest Condition tree), duration{baseSeconds,skillVar,atMaxSeconds,modifiers[{var,atMin,atMax}]}, cost, sound, producesWaste
data_files.data/stats.json: needs / skills (growth curve tuning.skills.growthCurveExp makes high levels slower) / personality (static traits, e.g. cleanliness)
data_files.data/tuning.json: All tunables: character(+marker), camera(+rotate/twist), doors, fire(+panicSeconds), interaction, audio(+UI/feedback sounds), phone(+icon,jobListSize), work(+autoSpeed,promotionHappinessFactor), bills(intervalDays), bladderFailure, starvation, energyCollapse, feedback, waste, garbage, credit, visa(startStatus), view(wallCutHeight), skills(growthCurveExp), quests, economy
data_files.data/quests.json + simstate.json: Quests (trigger/completion Condition trees, rewards funds/setVar/unlockAsset/grantVisa) + designer variables (visaStatus, job, income)
data_files.data/visas.json: Visa state machine defs (visitor 15d start, lmia, temp_worker, permanent_resident, citizen; durations/grace/applications)
data_files.data/jobs.json: Jobs: requirements(Condition), grantsVisa, hours, payPerShift, maxSkips, minCreditScore, needsCost, levels[{suffix,payPerShift,promoteChancePercent}]
data_files.data/finance.json: Formula bills/rent (base+perAssetValue*assetTotal; rent by propertyType+floor tiles), overdueDays/tooLateDays/negativeGraceDays
data_files.data/bills.json: Bill id/name list (amounts computed via finance.json)
data_files.data/happiness.json: Weighted happiness formula components (var, weight, min/max)
data_files.data/loading.json: Loading screen: phrases[], phraseIntervalSeconds, music, background, bar{fillColor,trackColor,height}

tools: tools/assets.html (Asset Editor: everything on AssetDef + 3D preview w/ map-matched grid + sprite/GIF preview)
tools/interactions.html (Interaction Editor: all ActionDef fields incl. conditions builder, duration+modifiers, cost, waste, censor; warns on blank animation)
tools/tuning.html (Tuning Editor: generic tuning groups + needs/skills/personality add-remove)
tools/map.html (Map Editor: objects/floors/walls/doors/windows/spawn, multi-map, undo, nav overlay, music)
tools/animations.html (Animation Mapper: clipMap incl. FBX sources w/ mixamorig retargeting, marker, core states incl. sit_ground/pee/panic/collapse/starve)
tools/quests.html (Quest Editor: condition builder, rewards incl. grantVisa)
tools/career.html (Career Editor: visas + jobs CRUD incl. levels, minCreditScore)
tools/finance.html (Finance Editor: bill/rent formulas, thresholds, live preview, happiness formula card)

verification_gates.typescript: npx tsc --noEmit --strict --target es2020 --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --skipLibCheck game/*.ts
verification_gates.pure_suites: npx tsx test/<name>.test.ts (ONE at a time). Suites: quests, visas, work, phone, bills, food, garbage, accidents, doors, windows, wallview, facing, usepose, seatground, bladder, duration, marker, camera, sprites, fbxclips, stats, happiness, promotion, contextmenu, buymode, nav, anim, charfit, interaction-conditions, audio, progressbar, locomotion.smoke, meshfit(tsx only)
verification_gates.jsdom_suites: node test/*.test.mjs + node tools/*.test.mjs (asset/tuning/interaction/quest/career/finance editors, map-editor(SELF-DERIVING fixtures — keep it that way), animation-editor, toolnav, sw-routing, bills/hud smoke)
verification_gates.boot: GET http://localhost:5173 must boot (#boot gets class 'done'), zero new console errors

state_summary.shipped: Full sim loop (needs/skills/personality/autonomy/poses), quests, doors/windows/exterior door, wall-cut view, accidents+fire spread/destruction, transients, garbage/tidying+carry, carried food+perish+action costs, buy/sell mode (floor-only, wall-mount rules), PWA/mobile, audio (actions/assets/music/UI+feedback sounds), camera pan/pinch/rotate, sprites/GIF visuals, overhead marker, censor, progress bars (aligned), duration system w/ multi-var modifiers, interaction conditions, contextual radial action menu, asset lights+ON/OFF state, wall-mounted assets, VISA system (game over), phone (HUD icon, jobs, applications, bills, credit), going to work (hide+5x+pay+needsCost+skips), job levels+happiness-scaled promotions, finance (formula bills/rent, debt, repo man, credit score), bladder/energy/hunger failure events, skill/money floating feedback, 0.5m grid/0.25 snap. BATCH 7: Asset Editor preview shows in-game size grounded at y=0 (game transforms applied live); cooked-meal hunger scales with cooking skill (tuning.food); fridge-walk root cause fixed (food actions defer seat to second leg); progress bar camera-space anchoring fix (world-space offset projected wrong under isometric camera); work departure window (tuning.work.departureWindowHours, missed=skip at window close) + autonomous departure (happiness>=40 & energy>=25, tunable, wakes from sleep); LOADING SCREEN (real asset-load gate, sim time frozen, data/loading.json: phrases/music/background/bar, Tuning Editor Loading card, pure game/loading.ts).
state_summary.commit_head_note: ~60 commits on local master; check git log

next_steps: SAVE SYSTEM (biggest gap): every runtime system exposes serialize()/restore() (QuestRunner, AccidentRegistry, BuyOverlay, VisaState, FinanceState, work/skips/levels, garbage fill, asset ON/OFF, food/waste) — needs a save/load surface (localStorage or data/save/ via API, gitignored) + boot-time restore wiring + autosave cadence
Designer to delete the legacy placed 'phone' asset (smartphone HUD icon replaced it)
Non-payment-of-bills consequences beyond repo (recorded in ROADMAP B4-1 as deferred)

Designer authoring passes: quests granting upgrade visas, Animation Mapper clips for sit_ground/pee/panic/collapse/starve/extinguishing_fire/cleaning, real sounds replacing placeholder WAVs, real meshes for remaining stand-ins
Playtest-only outstanding: radial menu touch, camera twist device, lights/wall-mounts visuals, repo-man flow, loading screen on slow network, auto-depart-to-work behavior
known_quirks: test/meshfit.test.mjs passes only under npx tsx, never plain node (documented, ignore)
Sandboxed browser panes can't run WebGL/rAF — verify boot via #boot.done + console, not screenshots
Stove fire baseChancePercent may be a testing value (designer toggles it)
Windows CRLF warnings on git are noise
Sandboxed browser pane freezes CSS transitions too (computed opacity stuck at start value) — disable transition to read the real end state
Progress-bar lesson: THREE.Sprite offsets are CAMERA-space; never anchor a sprite by world-space offsets
